_meta.purpose: Curated, human-VERIFIED dedicated allergy-safe / nut-free kitchens. A match sets a trusted nut_free / allergy-aware signal that feeds the scorer's down-pull. Dedicated nut-free kitchens are rare and barely discoverable online, so a curated data file (data, not scraping) is the only reliable way to credit them.
_meta.safety: A wrong 'nut_free' entry UNDER-reports risk for an allergic user. Every entry MUST be human-verified and carry a real `source`. Do NOT add a restaurant unless you have confirmed its current nut-free / dedicated-allergy status.
_meta.fields: name (str), city (str, optional, lowercased), domain (str, optional, registrable e.g. 'acme.com'), nut_free (bool), allergy_dedicated (bool), source (url), verified (YYYY-MM-DD)
_meta.matching: An entry matches a restaurant by registrable DOMAIN, or by (compact name match AND city present in the address). Domain match is the most reliable -- prefer it.

entries.name: Example Nut-Free Bakery
entries.note: FICTIONAL example demonstrating the schema -- NOT a real establishment. Replace with verified entries.
